steps.title: Find the unique contribution
steps.content: The text says Marquez and Richter reconstructed the earliest surviving annual fiscal records for any sovereign state. Those records show Philip II's defaults came from short-term liquidity crises, not long-term unsustainable debts.

steps.title: Avoid claims beyond the text
steps.content: Choice B reverses the relationship by saying defaults worsened liquidity crises. Choice C says they corrected Keller and Brandt, which is not stated. Choice D says the new evidence supports Keller and Brandt's hypothesis about Philip's defaults, which the text does not say. The answer is A.
